Hellot is a better support than she is a dps
really? helot does 1k but Ghelot does like 200
So let's ignore that for now
Ok, here's the short of it
Her chain card, that you can play thrice
Once it does, don't use it, wait for the cost to reduce
Wait until you have both Thais, and Ghelot ult and 2 evolved embryos minimum
Ult with Thais, clone the chain card, then Ghelot ult
Span the transformed card until the enemy dies
You only want to play the chain card if Ghelot has ulted

The problem with Ghelot is
She consumes HP for the frails
The evolved chains heal, but you don't want to use this until the burst turn
It's not worth to do it if she doesn't have it
So you need to be careful with your HP
Yeah, that's why you gotta pay attention to your furnace for heals and Aigis ult
Don't feel discouraged with running a sustain early on
If you don't want to jump those hops, Mouchette is a lot easier to understand and play
Once you get it in game you'll understand it pretty easy
And she also works with the same teamates
Mouchette is a Dearth resistance, strike unit, that does a OBSENE ammount of damage
well i dont really like just throwing stuff i like when i have to think alot about the cards and what to play
thats why i choose to play caro/ulta
She's good on arc 1, as a DPS

Sadly for arc 2, is relegated to a crit dmg support, unless you invest a lot on her
Arc 2 changes up how levels play a lot
Infinite combos/card spam is not possible there

You need to actually understand what enemy does if you want a chance at killing it
Final boss from chapter 1 arc 2 is the first filter

You want to kill them as fast as possible
